title: Fleuve Noir
content:
{{Top|rwc}}
[[File:FleuveNoir.png|thumb|right|Logo]]
'''Fleuve Noir''' is a [[Wikipedia:France|French]] imprint of the [[Univers Poche]] publishing company. Founded in [[1940s|1949]], Fleuve Noir is responsible for printing the [[Wikipedia:French language|French]] translations of the paperback ''[[Star Wars]]'' novels.

{{Company-stub|real}}
